entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A compatible requester who satisfies the Friends Only relationship policy submits a join request.
required_facts: A Friends Only join request was received.
No seat assignment or private information was granted.

variants.spooky: {requester_label} requests to join through Friends Only access.
variants.grim: {requester_label} submitted a Friends Only join request.
variants.gore_and_dread: {requester_label} waits beyond the fog under a recognized invitation of friendship.

entries.fallback: {requester_label} submitted a Friends Only join request.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A remote admission request lacks a valid session invitation in Invite Only mode.
required_facts: The request was rejected.
No room, seat, spectator, or private-state access was granted.

variants.spooky: The invitation is not valid for this session. The door remains closed.
variants.grim: Invite Only admission rejected. No access was granted.
variants.gore_and_dread: The token reaches the door and finds no name carved for it.

entries.fallback: Invite Only admission rejected. No access was granted.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A compatible requester submits a Request to Join for host review.
required_facts: The request entered the host review queue.
No gameplay authority was granted.

variants.spooky: {requester_label} requests to join. Host approval is required.
variants.gore_and_dread: {requester_label} waits at the edge of the board while the host decides whether the Tale has room.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: The host approves a queued join request.
required_facts: The requester may enter the public waiting state.
Approval does not reveal private seat information or complete a takeover.

variants.spooky: {requester_label} is approved to enter the public waiting state.
variants.grim: {requester_label} was approved. Seat assignment remains separate.
variants.gore_and_dread: {requester_label} is invited closer, though no private history has yet been opened.

entries.fallback: {requester_label} was approved. Seat assignment remains separate.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: The host declines a queued join request.
required_facts: The request was declined.
No room, spectator, seat, or private-state access was granted.

variants.spooky: The request is declined. The Tale continues with its current company.
variants.grim: Join request declined. No access was granted.
variants.gore_and_dread: The door remains closed, and the fog keeps the unanswered knock.

entries.fallback: Join request declined. No access was granted.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: An eligible game-controlled stable seat is reserved for a returning player.
required_facts: The named seat is reserved.
New players may not take it while the reservation remains active.

variants.spooky: {seat} remembers its previous hand and remains reserved.
variants.grim: {seat} is reserved for its returning player.
variants.gore_and_dread: The empty controls at {seat} remain warm. Another hand may not claim them yet.

entries.fallback: {seat} is reserved for its returning player.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A stable-seat reconnect reservation expires through the declared policy.
required_facts: The named seat is no longer reserved.
It may become eligible for approved takeover.

variants.spooky: {seat} has waited as long as the policy permits. The reservation is released.
variants.grim: {seat}'s reservation expired. The seat may now become eligible for takeover.
variants.gore_and_dread: The memory of the previous hand fades from {seat}. The controls are available again.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: An approved requester attempts player admission while no stable seat is eligible.
required_facts: No stable seat is currently eligible for takeover.
The requester may wait, spectate when allowed, or leave.

variants.spooky: No seat is ready to change hands. You may wait or observe if spectator access is allowed.
variants.grim: No eligible stable seat is available.
variants.gore_and_dread: Every place is occupied, reserved, or mid-consequence. The board will not invent another.

entries.fallback: No eligible stable seat is available.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: An approved requester enters spectator mode.
required_facts: The requester receives only the approved public projection.
The requester has no gameplay authority.

variants.spooky: {requester_label} joins as a witness. Observation grants no seat authority.
variants.grim: {requester_label} entered spectator mode with public-only access.
variants.gore_and_dread: {requester_label} takes a place beyond the board, close enough to watch and too far to touch.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: An approved spectator accepts promotion to a stable seat and the handoff is queued.
required_facts: The promotion is pending a safe handoff.
No private seat information is visible yet.

variants.spooky: {requester_label} is approaching {seat}. The current action must finish before the seat changes hands.
variants.grim: {requester_label}'s promotion to {seat} is pending a safe handoff.
variants.gore_and_dread: {requester_label} stands behind {seat} while the Tale completes the decision already in motion.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A spectator-to-player authority transfer commits at a safe handoff.
required_facts: The named stable seat is now human-controlled.
All inherited seat state remains unchanged except control source.

variants.spooky: {requester_label} now controls {seat}. The seat's condition, possessions, and obligations remain.
variants.grim: {requester_label} now controls {seat}. No gameplay state was reset.
variants.gore_and_dread: {requester_label} takes {seat}; the wounds, secrets, and debts were already waiting.

entries.fallback: {requester_label} now controls {seat}. No gameplay state was reset.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A host-authorized remote-player removal revokes the controller and transfers the stable seat to game control.
required_facts: The remote player's authority was revoked.
The named seat and all gameplay state remain under game control.

variants.spooky: {seat} is now game-controlled. Its state remains in the Tale.
variants.grim: Remote control was revoked. {seat} is now game-controlled with no gameplay reset.
variants.gore_and_dread: The hand leaves {seat}. The wounds, items, and unfinished promises remain for the game to carry.

entries.fallback: {seat} is now game-controlled. No gameplay state was reset.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: The active online host departs and the declared session policy requires a bounded pause.
required_facts: The session is paused under the host-departure policy.
No gameplay authority or hidden information transferred yet.

variants.spooky: The host connection has ended. The Tale pauses while the session policy resolves what follows.
variants.grim: Host departed. The session is paused pending reconnection, transfer, or closure.
variants.gore_and_dread: The hand at the door is gone. Every lock waits to learn who inherits the keys.

entries.fallback: Host departed. The session is paused pending policy resolution.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A reviewed host-authority transfer commits without changing gameplay-seat authority.
required_facts: Administrative host authority transferred.
No private gameplay state or stable-seat ownership changed solely because of host transfer.

variants.spooky: Session host authority has transferred. The Tale and every stable seat remain otherwise unchanged.
variants.grim: Host transfer completed. Gameplay-seat authority is unchanged.
variants.gore_and_dread: The keys change hands; the names upon the board do not.

entries.fallback: Host transfer completed. Gameplay-seat authority is unchanged.
